title: JellyJams
body:
**Current Version: 1.21.11**

A resourcepack that is a WIP. I plan on doing most if not all things in minecraft, while keeping a cute, but mostly vanilla feel. Includes remodels and textures!
Atm the 1.21.11 ghast saddle and pig saddle are broken but I plan on fixing it soon.
**_TW: Ghast is bloody_**

Changes to:
- cows
- sheep
- squids
- glow squids
- pigs
- chimken
- ghasts
- foxes
- mooshrooms
- mushrooms & mushroom block

### For Fabric Port, dependencies on: 
- [Entity Model Features ](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 


### Credit
Can I use this in Video Content? Yes! :D I only ask that if prompted for what resourcepack is shown, proper credit is given to me where it is due :)
Please ask before use in modpacks. 

You can edit my pack, but if any original or mostly original piece recognizable to my pack is shown, credit should still go to me (Ex. You use the model but re-paint the texture).

<details>
<summary>Examples of proper credit:</summary>

When asked what resourcepack you're using to an audience, tell them its the JellyJams resourcepack!

A little blurb in the video description of what resourcepack you are using

</details>



All rights are reserved to me.
